intro: Our research lab is involved in innovative projects across autonomous driving, intelligent networks, and edge computing. Below are the active and completed projects currently highlighted on the site.

projects.title: A research on the core technologies for securing fully autonomous driving by cooperation between vehicles and edge computing
Development of 6H Next Generation Mobile Communications Technology
Development of Candidate Element Technology for Intelligent 6G Mobile Core Network

collaborationCta: If you're interested in collaborating on any of these projects or exploring new research directions,
